text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Tokai Teio spying on Mejiro McQueen as
she trains...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're just the person I wanted to see! Could
I ask you a favor?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I need to find out why McQueen was chosen to
appear on the URA poster, but I haven't figured it
out yet...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it looks like she's already figured out why I
was chosen...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sooo could you find out what answer McQueen
came up with? Oh, but be subtle about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I find myself semi-coerced into quizzing
Mejiro McQueen for information...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you... I regret that you had to witness that
unsightly exhibition the other day...
choice_data_list: There's something I want to ask you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Actually, I'd appreciate your advice
as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've been posed a certain question and I'm having
difficulty deducing an answer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio are
both struggling with the same task. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, hey! What are you doing?! Don't
come over here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since they're having trouble with the same issue, I
speed up the process by getting them to talk to
each other.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! So you're not onto anything either?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Why were you acting so carefree when you didn't
even have the answer yet?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You were the one teasing me as if you had already settled on an answer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The heck? I can't believe you went crying to the
trainer for help after acting all tough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? I believe you sought out help before I did!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well... That's 'cause, um... Uhhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I just didn't want to lose, that's all! I mean, look at
you...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You've got all these strengths that I don't have.
You're patient and you never give up, no matter
what problem you're facing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I got all panicked 'cause I figured that persistence
of yours would lead you to an answer before me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I... feel the same, actually. I assumed you'd
already found an answer using some unique
method that never would have occurred to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our answers... Oh. Each of us has strengths that
the other lacks...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Right... That's why we were chosen!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Each of you has strengths that the other lacks... I
see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You mean to say that alone you would each be
lacking, but as a pair you form a complete
package?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mm, not exactly. It's more like... when I watch
McQueen, I can see where I'm lacking.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm motivated to get stronger and fill in those
blanks... 'cause I don't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We're not perfect. But as long as we continue to
compete against one other without becoming
disheartened, then we can keep getting stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's the reason you chose us, correct? This
dynamic we share?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! I was curious as to what you two would
discover...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But your answer far exceeded my expectations.
As you two compete, you encourage each other
and influence so many, all while carving out a new
path...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you better each other, the light that you shine
will illuminate a path toward the future!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, Prez praised us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You mustn't revel too much. Nothing good ever comes of your overexcit—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Have you seen that poster featuring Teio and
McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: They both looked so beautiful! Elegant, yet cool!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I hope we get to be on a poster like that
someday!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! It's gonna happen for sure! And that's a
promise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see... So that's what she meant by "a light that
shines toward the future." ...Well, that's all the
more reason to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Let's get way, way stronger! Then we'll
shine so bright that everyone's gonna have to
cover their eyes!
